name: @firegrid/proofs
description: F#/Fable proof harness: compiled property runner, trial evidence (spans.jsonl queried through chdb), runner-owned resources (s2-lite, process hosts), fault injection, and the ratchet targets mode.

scripts.build: NUGET_PACKAGES=${NUGET_PACKAGES:-$PWD/../../.nuget/packages} dotnet tool run fable -- Firegrid.Proofs.Harness.fsproj -o dist --optimize --noCache --noRestore
scripts.diagnostics: echo '@firegrid/proofs diagnostics are covered by F# compile'
scripts.lint: echo '@firegrid/proofs lint is covered by F# compile'
